abilities.name: Hide in Shadow
abilities.description: Toggle ability. Blend into shadows to avoid detection by hostile factions. Cancels when combat starts.

abilities.name: Invisibility (Mage)
abilities.description: Become unseen by hostile factions. Cancels when combat starts.

abilities.name: Invisibility (Cleric)
abilities.description: Divine invisibility. Hostile factions cannot detect you. Breaks in combat.

abilities.name: Nature's Veil (Druid)
abilities.description: Become one with nature, hidden from hostile eyes. Breaks in combat.
